commit.message:
Add README with architecture overview, setup, and API docs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Implement notification system with server cluster, workers, emulators, and load testing

- Notification server: REST API, input validation, template rendering, Redis caching, RabbitMQ routing
- Notification worker: 4 dedicated queue consumers (APNS/FCM/SMS/EMAIL) with retry logic
- Third-party emulator: simulates delivery services with 95% success rate
- Device emulator: receives notifications, WebSocket broadcast, REST stats
- Load client: seeds test data, multi-threaded load test with p95/p99 reporting
- Infrastructure: PostgreSQL, Redis, RabbitMQ, Prometheus, Grafana with pre-provisioned dashboard
- Docker Compose with service health checks and replicas
- 27 unit tests covering validation, services, controllers, consumers
- Component diagram in drawio format

commit.message:
V3.0: Add EtherCAT tab (LAN9252 SOES) and RS485 serial terminal

- Add EtherCAT tab with 4 sub-tabs (Status & Control, PDO Test, Diagnostics, EEPROM)
  - Full port of LAN9252 Monitor (tkinter) to PyQt6, 8 tabs consolidated into 4
  - PDO Test: RxPDO controls + TxPDO status + real-time graph (position/velocity/torque)
  - Auto SAFE-OP on connect, AL state auto-monitoring during PDO cyclic
  - Admin privilege detection with UAC elevation restart + auto-reconnect
  - Slave info: SDO read for Device Name, HW/SW Version (PRE-OP+)
  - SII EEPROM: preview/read/write/verify with JSON config save/load
- Add RS485 serial terminal dock (side-by-side with CAN terminal)
- Rename: Motor Control -> Motor Control (PCAN)
- Title: OpenRobot Motor Tool V3.0 (PCAN + EtherCAT)

feat: Visual refresh with Catppuccin Latte theme and modern polish (#29)

* feat: Visual refresh with Catppuccin Latte theme and modern polish

Replace the generic blue/white color scheme with the Catppuccin Latte
palette for a cohesive, refined aesthetic. Key changes:

- Migrate all 18 color tokens to Catppuccin Latte values (Base, Mantle,
  Crust, Surface0, Blue, Lavender, Subtext0, etc.)
- Replace 9 hardcoded rgba() blue values and 1 hardcoded hex
- Switch assistant bubbles to Mantle background, user bubbles to Base text
- Add subtle card hover lift (translateY), smooth scroll, and fade-in
  animations for HTMX-swapped content
- Use Lavender for focus rings, tinted shadows, and ::selection styling
- Refine question block, spinner, and empty state components

Closes #26

background separation for a more polished Catppuccin Latte experience.

fix: correct CVE-2018-11976 assessment — dead end, not promising

Primary source verification (NCC Group Cachegrab README, whitepaper
"Hardware-Backed Heist" pp.5/15/17, NVD) confirms this is a
post-exploitation technique requiring root + custom kernel module.
Extracts app-level ECDSA keys, not useful for privilege escalation.
Added as dead vector #15 in OUTSTANDING-TASKS.md.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Switch Daytona to python:3.12-slim with 4 CPU / 8GB resources

Use CreateSandboxFromImageParams(image='python:3.12-slim') with
Resources(cpu=4, memory=8, disk=10) instead of CreateSandboxBaseParams.
This gives root access, multi-core CPU, and fast boot (~0.6-0.8s).
Updated all 13 files with Daytona paths back to /root/.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(pipeline): resolve 22 failed jobs — 5 root causes

1. binance-web3: add 3-tier proxy fallback (direct→VPS→CF Worker)
   with strategy caching, matching binance-futures pattern
2. job-runner: fix ON CONFLICT clauses to include market_type and
   trunc_hour(as_of_ts), matching actual unique index definitions
3. dydx: remove from batch group D — /v4/leaderboard/pnl API
   discontinued (404 globally, not geo-blocked)
4. batch-fetch-traders: add 240s per-platform timeout to prevent
   stuck jobs that block the entire group
5. batch-enrich: add 80s per-platform timeout to prevent stuck
   enrichments from consuming the full 300s Vercel limit

commit.message:
fix: Web Speech API の音声が再生されないバグを修正

原因1: Chrome の cancel() → speak() 同期呼び出しバグ
  → setTimeout(0) で非同期化し、paused 状態なら resume() を呼ぶ

原因2: SpeechSynthesisUtterance が GC されて再生が止まる
  → モジュールスコープの _currentUtterance 変数で参照を保持

原因3: SpeakButton に onerror ハンドラがなく「再生中」で固まる
  → speakWord/speakSentence/speakWordWithVariant に onError を追加

原因4: 音声認識（マイク）動作中に TTS を呼んで競合
  → isListening が true の間は自動再生をスキップ

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: scanner stopt niet meer na 10 scans + delete-all endpoint

- Server retry: 4→6 pogingen met langere exponential backoff (rate limits)
- Client retry: 3→5 pogingen voor zowel API errors als network errors
- Stale detection timeout: 70s→90s (Opus is langzamer dan Sonnet)
- Nieuwe velden (productCode, publisher, releaseYear, pricing) doorstromen
  van API response → QueueItem.result
- DELETE endpoint: deleteAll=true optie om alle dynamic products te wissen
- Jitter verhoogd om thundering herd te voorkomen bij 10+ concurrent scans

commit.message:
Fix PKCE: generate code_verifier in start-oauth and pass to token exchange

Root cause: google-auth-oauthlib adds code_challenge to auth URL but
handle_oauth_callback creates a NEW flow (loses the code_verifier),
causing Google to return 'invalid_grant: Missing code verifier'

Fix:
- start_google_drive_oauth now explicitly generates PKCE code_verifier
  and code_challenge, adds them to the authorization URL, and stores
  code_verifier in Flask session
- google_oauth_callback retrieves code_verifier from session and passes
  it to handle_oauth_callback
- handle_oauth_callback accepts optional code_verifier param and passes
  it to flow.fetch_token when available
- settings.py callback also retrieves and passes code_verifier

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add in-depth caching layer comparison (stellar-core vs henyey)

Documents all caching layers in both systems: LedgerTxn MVCC chain,
mEntryCache, mBestOffers, InMemorySorobanState in stellar-core; and
LedgerStateManager, loaded_accounts, prefetch_cache, OfferIndex,
SharedSorobanState in henyey. Includes layer-by-layer comparison
table and analysis of the five key structural differences.

Co-authored-by: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Optimize TFLite inference with batch processing and timing instrumentation

TFLiteModel.embed() now uses resize_tensor_input for single-invoke batch
processing instead of a per-item Python loop, with automatic sequential
fallback if resize fails. Interpreter uses os.cpu_count() threads by default.
Added decode/features/inference timing logs to worker, detector, and trainer.

commit.message:
feat(vpn-qbittorrent): add socat proxy so web UI is reachable from LAN

The qBittorrent web UI was only accessible via SSH port-forward because
10.200.200.2 is a veth address local to the host. A new socat proxy service
(qbittorrent-vpn-proxy) forwards host:8080 → namespace:8080, making
http://Radxa-X4:8080 work directly from any machine on the LAN or Tailscale.
Firewall port 8080 is now opened automatically by the module.

commit.message:
Add automated post-session cleanup: kill AC/Conspit, dismiss errors, foreground lock screen

On SessionEnded, SubSessionEnded, and auto-blank timer:
- Kill acs.exe, AssettoCorsa.exe, ConspitLink2.0.exe
- Kill WerFault.exe (crash/error dialogs)
- Minimize Steam, Settings, NVIDIA overlay windows
- Close Settings windows
- Bring lock screen browser to foreground and maximize

Ensures clean blank screen for next customer without manual intervention.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: P3/P4/P5 + Topology 단순화

P3 — 총 연결 수 기반 워커 자동 배분:
- LoadConfig.num_connections 의미를 per-worker → 총량(total)으로 변경
- LoadConfig.connections_per_worker(n) / with_num_connections() 추가
- Generator: 워커 스폰 시 총량 ÷ worker_count로 per-worker load 자동 계산
- UI: 레이블 · 예상 연결 수 표시 업데이트

P4 — Ramp-down 지원:
- LoadConfig.ramp_down_secs: u64 추가 (0=즉시 중지)
- TestState::RampingDown 추가 (Display, serde 포함)
- TestEvent::RampDownStarted / RampDownComplete 추가
- Orchestrator.stop() → do_stop() 분리, ramp_down_secs > 0이면 RampingDown 상태 경유
- UI: ramping_down 배지(purple), isRunning 포함, Ramp-down 입력 필드

P5 — CC / BW 시험 동작 분리:
- TCP CC: 연결 유지 + idle/소량 교환 (1초 간격), BW: 기존 streaming 동작
- HTTP/1.1 CC: keep-alive + 1초 간격 경량 요청, BW: back-to-back 최대 속도
- HTTP/2 CC: h2 연결 유지 + 1초 간격 단일 스트림, BW: 기존 다중 스트림

Topology 단순화:
- IP/인터페이스 정보 제거, 중간 Host 노드 제거
- Generator(Client) → Responder(Server) 2-노드 구조로 단순화
